title: lastrea filix-mas var. cochleata
intro: Lastrea filix-mas var. cochleata, also known as the shield fern or button fern, is a type of fern plant with a distinctive shield-shaped frond. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lastrea filix-mas var. cochleata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
